law: Common use cases include: High-fidelity gaming experiences streamed from a powerful computer.
This sample project requires use of the entitlement.

Create an immersive space to display streamed content for the session by defining an in the app’s body: The app allows the person to adjust the size of the streamed content relative to passthrough by applying the immersion style, but you can also use the or immersion styles.
This is the recommended connection method for people in close proximity to their streaming computer and its display.
The sample initializes the IP address and port variables with so that the person doesn’t have to reenter them each time they use the app.
You can use signaling headers to authenticate and manage the connection.
This ensures that the controls don’t interfere with the streamed content, allowing the person to position them wherever is most convenient in their environment.
For example, you can add app-specific controls that don’t fit in the minimized view, or remove the expanded view entirely if all of the controls fit within the .

While you can use scene phase to determine window visibility, note that windows also enter the background state when inactive (such as when a person places a window behind them or focuses on another app).
The attaches a to an entity and updates the based on its translation as the person moves it around: Use this transform to reposition and synchronize your streamed content with the immersive space.
